name: property managers handling 10-20 rental units tool
description: For property managers handling 10-20 rental units, inefficient tenant communication causes late rent payments. We automate tenant communication and rent collection instead of manual communication and rent collection processes.
problem_solved: Inefficient tenant communication and delayed rent collection

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient tenant communication and delayed rent collection
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers handling 10-20 rental units, inefficient tenant communication causes late rent payments. We automate tenant communication and rent collection instead of manual communication and rent collection processes.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual communication and rent collection processes

one_liner: For property managers handling 10-20 rental units, inefficient tenant communication causes late rent payments. We automate tenant communication and rent collection instead of manual communication and rent collection processes.
